label: MEASURE
problem: Produce a contamination-controlled, matrix-specific result that another qualified laboratory can reproduce.
technical_bottleneck: Reference materials, recovery controls, size-window disclosure, polymer identification and cross-laboratory comparability.
economic_owner: Research sponsors, public agencies, contract laboratories and regulated water laboratories.
buyer_state: verified program and matrix-specific demand; product willingness to pay remains company-specific
purchase_trigger: Funded assay development, laboratory accreditation, required monitoring, cohort scale-up or intervention validation.
evidence_gate: Independent interlaboratory performance on the target matrix with declared recovery, blanks, accuracy, precision and method window.
moat_hypothesis: A complete reference, QA and workflow system with longitudinal proficiency data. Sensitivity alone is insufficient.
capital_adoption_horizon: NOW · medium to high development capital; research and regulated laboratory adoption precede clinical use
capital_intensity: Medium to high development capital; reference production, matrix validation and multi-site proficiency require laboratory and coordination costs.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: grant/pre-seed for method formation; Seed to Series A only after independent matrix-specific reproducibility and a repeat decision-linked buyer.

verified_programs_or_records.name: NIST MNP metrology program
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Research and reference-material activity; product validation remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: California drinking-water framework
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: State method and reporting framework; it establishes no health limit.

verified_programs_or_records.name: ARPA-H STOMP
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Committed program and anticipated awards; achieved assay performance remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: Proposed UCMR 6
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Official method and capacity gap in a proposal; it establishes no final monitoring mandate.

diligence_question: Can the platform reproduce the same decision-relevant result across sites without hiding contamination or method boundaries?
advance_milestone: Independent multi-site validation plus a repeat buyer whose decision changes because of the result.
kill_event: Performance collapses outside a founder-run laboratory or the buyer can satisfy the use case with incumbent instruments and open standards.
failure_mode: Standardization may favor incumbents, compress margins or leave demand dependent on episodic public research funding.

label: MAP
problem: Connect measurements over time, source and context without pretending incompatible inputs share one scale.
technical_bottleneck: Provenance, method normalization, longitudinal sampling and uncertainty-aware source attribution.
economic_owner: Research programs and, when a decision is demonstrated, utilities, product stewards and industrial EHS or quality teams.
buyer_state: economic owners inferred; no unified recurring procurement budget established by the cited record
purchase_trigger: A compliance, hotspot, source-control or process-change decision that cannot be made from a single sample.
evidence_gate: Method metadata survive every join; repeat sampling and prospective source attribution outperform a transparent baseline.
moat_hypothesis: Decision-linked longitudinal data, chain of custody and workflow integration rather than a generic dashboard.
capital_adoption_horizon: NEXT · lower software capital, high data-acquisition and integration cost
capital_intensity: Lower software build cost than laboratory or hardware layers, but high recurring cost for comparable longitudinal data, metadata and ground truth.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: pre-seed/Seed only around one repeated source, compliance or process decision; broad exposome mapping without a buyer remains a research project.

verified_programs_or_records.name: EPA microplastics methods research
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Methods agenda; a scalable data market remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: NIEHS exposomics strategy
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Research strategy with no dedicated commercial budget established in the cited record.

verified_programs_or_records.name: California drinking-water framework
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: One matrix-specific policy use case; a universal exposure map remains outside scope.

diligence_question: Which named customer decision changes, and can the attribution survive new data and a different laboratory?
advance_milestone: A paying user repeatedly reallocates mitigation or compliance spend from a prospectively validated attribution.
kill_event: Heterogeneous methods cannot be normalized without assumptions that dominate the result.
failure_mode: Open public infrastructure may absorb aggregation value while data incompatibility blocks reliable attribution.

label: ATTRIBUTE
problem: Link a defined particle, route and dose to distribution, mechanism and an outcome that matters.
technical_bottleneck: Combinatorial particle properties, relevant exposure design, whole-body distribution and human concordance.
economic_owner: Public research programs and product or chemical toxicology R&D; a broader commercial buyer remains to be proven.
buyer_state: verified public research problem; private economic owner inferred
purchase_trigger: A reformulation, restriction, therapeutic-target or risk-management decision requires causal discrimination.
evidence_gate: A property-specific mechanism replicates across relevant models and prospectively predicts a human signal or decision.
moat_hypothesis: Reference libraries, paired human specimens and a model that predicts rather than merely explains retrospective data.
capital_adoption_horizon: NEXT · medium to high platform and preclinical capital
capital_intensity: Medium to high platform and preclinical capital because property-specific models, orthogonal assays and human-relevance work must converge.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: formation/pre-seed while mechanism is replicated; Seed to Series A only when a named R&D or risk decision pays for predictive evidence.

verified_programs_or_records.name: ARPA-H STOMP Technical Area 2
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Program objective for biological mechanisms; causal success remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: STOMP validation FAQ
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Target requirements; completed human validation remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: NIEHS exposomics strategy
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Public research direction; product demand remains unestablished.

diligence_question: Does the platform isolate one decision-changing mechanism from route, dose, matrix and host confounding?
advance_milestone: A prospective prediction replicates independently and changes a product, regulatory or clinical research decision.
kill_event: The particle × route × dose space fragments into bespoke service projects with no reusable learning curve.
failure_mode: Generic CROs may capture the revenue while the claimed platform moat never emerges.

label: PREVENT
problem: Reduce a defined release or exposure source without shifting particles, energy use or waste elsewhere.
technical_bottleneck: Field capture, fouling, maintenance, energy, mass balance and safe disposal.
economic_owner: Utility or plant operator, OEM, manufacturer, fleet or municipality for a defined source.
buyer_state: economic owners are use-case specific; scoped monitoring and compliance triggers are verified
purchase_trigger: Discharge or product specification, regulation, avoided treatment cost, maintenance saving or audited sustainability requirement.
evidence_gate: Audited field denominator and particle identity alongside uptime, pressure or energy, maintenance and disposal economics.
moat_hypothesis: OEM or utility integration, self-cleaning operation, installed service network and longitudinal field data.
capital_adoption_horizon: NOW / NEXT · medium to high hardware capital and site qualification
capital_intensity: Medium to high hardware and field-operations capital; qualification, fouling, uptime, waste handling and service coverage dominate beyond the prototype.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: pilot-backed Seed; Series A/B only after audited multi-site capture and repeat orders under full-system operating economics.

verified_programs_or_records.name: EU Regulation 2023/2055 implementation
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Scoped intentionally added-particle restriction; a blanket emissions market is outside scope.

verified_programs_or_records.name: California drinking-water framework
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Monitoring framework can inform verification; capture-product validation remains separate.

verified_programs_or_records.name: Proposed UCMR 6
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Method readiness gap; the proposal creates no federal filtration requirement.

diligence_question: Does the system remove a defined source at acceptable total operating cost without simply moving the problem?
advance_milestone: Multi-site recurring contract with independently verified capture and acceptable full-system economics.
kill_event: Fouling, maintenance, energy or secondary-waste handling erases the customer value.
failure_mode: Commodity filtration can compress margins, and capture without final disposal can relocate rather than prevent exposure.

label: REPLACE
problem: Match application function, safety and price while proving end-of-life fate in the real leakage environment.
technical_bottleneck: Qualification, migration or contact safety, manufacturing scale, feedstock, fate and lifecycle performance.
economic_owner: Product-formulation, packaging, manufacturing and procurement teams facing a defined specification or restriction.
buyer_state: scoped regulatory trigger verified; product adoption and unit economics remain company-specific
purchase_trigger: REACH compliance, customer specification, line performance, lifecycle target or cost parity in a named application.
evidence_gate: Application performance, contact safety, relevant environmental fate, lifecycle result, line compatibility and durable unit economics.
moat_hypothesis: Application IP, process know-how, certification, customer qualification and feedstock or offtake relationships.
capital_adoption_horizon: NEXT · medium capital for coatings; potentially high for new bulk-material capacity
capital_intensity: Medium for formulation/coating platforms and potentially high for bulk-material capacity, qualification inventory and manufacturing scale-up.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: application-specific Seed after functional proof; Series A/B only after customer qualification, lifecycle evidence and credible unit economics.

verified_programs_or_records.name: EU Regulation 2023/2055 implementation
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Creates scoped substitution triggers and transitions; does not certify an alternative as safer.

diligence_question: Is the replacement measurably safer in the real use and end-of-life context while preserving customer economics?
advance_milestone: High-volume multi-site qualification with independent fate and lifecycle evidence plus repeat orders.
kill_event: The material only works in a narrow demonstration, fails qualification or requires economics that disappear at scale.
failure_mode: Long qualification cycles, petrochemical price pressure and manufacturing capital can destroy returns before adoption.

label: REMOVE
problem: Safely reduce a biologically meaningful burden and improve a patient-relevant outcome.
technical_bottleneck: Target definition, assay validation, tissue distribution, rebound, procedure-introduced particles, safety and clinical benefit.
economic_owner: Research sponsors now; hospitals and payers only after a defined indication, validated burden and outcome evidence.
buyer_state: future public research workstream verified; clinical economic owner and reimbursement inferred
purchase_trigger: A controlled study defines an actionable burden and a safe intervention with durable benefit.
evidence_gate: Independent controlled study with orthogonal assays, clean circuit, tissue or total-burden relevance, durability, safety and patient benefit.
moat_hypothesis: Validated measurement, a target-specific intervention, and regulatory and outcomes data. Clinic branding alone is insufficient.
capital_adoption_horizon: FRONTIER · high clinical and regulatory capital
capital_intensity: High clinical, regulatory and measurement capital; clean-circuit controls, orthogonal assays, durability and patient outcomes are all required.
plausible_venture_stage: Delphi inference: public/translational research frontier; conventional clinical venture scaling waits for independently controlled target-burden and benefit evidence.

verified_programs_or_records.name: ARPA-H STOMP future Technical Area 3
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Later intended workstream that was absent from the initial solicitation; achieved removal remains unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: Weinstein plasma-exchange study
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Uncontrolled proprietary-assay signal; total-body clearance and benefit remain unestablished.

verified_programs_or_records.name: NCT07658443
verified_programs_or_records.boundary: Small observational biomarker study with no posted results.

diligence_question: What relevant burden is being removed, how is it independently measured, and which patient outcome improves?
advance_milestone: Independent prospective controlled evidence of safe, durable reduction in a relevant burden with patient benefit.
kill_event: Circulating signal proves unrelated to tissue burden or benefit, or the procedure adds risk and particles faster than it clears them.
failure_mode: Rebound, weak target biology, procedure risk, cost and payer rejection can defeat the category even if a blood signal changes.
